posts.author: PacificP (Pacific)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

allow empty folders to stay on all colleagues workspaces not just the creator of the folder

What are you trying to achieve

We all use the folders to move boards in and out of as needed, this can’t solely rely on only the creator to move the boards - if the folders are not visible for everyone when empty, no one is able to move boards.
